title: Sthananga Sutra: Numerical Classification of All Things
description: A systematic classification of everything in the Jain universe by number — from one to ten — the earliest known attempt at comprehensive enumeration.
introduction: A systematic classification of everything in the Jain universe by number — from one to ten — the earliest known attempt at comprehensive enumeration.

translation.text: There is one soul. There are two types of knowledge. There are three jewels of Jainism: right faith, right knowledge, right conduct. There are four states of existence.
